TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Suo-luo-ya-se-deÁĎ£ÁĺÖšļěśĖĮŚĺ∑ == Suo-luo-ya-se-de "Si-la-yi : "őĖŌČŌĀőŅő¨ŌÉŌĄŌĀő∑Ōā kaudipan nida kalawlawan nu katuuday, idaw ku musakamuay nuayawan tu nemtu wal mihacaan tu nuayawan aca tu limlim cay mihcaan" i cudada sa Cea-la-tu-se-te'-la "A-wi-se-tuo-yi : ZaraőłuŇ°tra, yimi "idaway ku Luo-tuo a tademaw", ci Ku-puo-se maluayaway matinengay mutademaw, mipaypayan tu lamal a patidengay nu tademawan. Suo-luo-ya-se-de mihapusa A-hu-la.Ma-ce u patidengay tu di'tuan sa, sisa ci nida sadikuday mala Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay a satalakaway nu di'tuan. nina kiwkay minayat tu tusa malebut lima a lasubu mihcaan. katukuh ayda idaw henay ku misinzaay nu tadeamwan. ci nida u Suo-luo-ya-se-de sakaykiwkay nu cudad "A-wi-se-ta" u "Puo-se-ku-cin" nu "Cei-tay" a misulitay nu tademaw. idaw ku kamu tu nikatabal a patay. nina naayaway a kiwkay sakamusa "A-hu-la-ciw", "Ma-ce-ta-cia", tada misinza tu satalakaway nu A-hu-la.Ma-ce-ta-ku'. :ZaraőłuŇ°tra,śĄŹÁāļ" . nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan nida i Mi-ti-wan-kuo " aydaay nu Yi-lan amisan" a siidaay nu misubayuay a lumaan, limucedan ku wina, caay ka tinengi ku wama. tusa ku mihcaan miliyasa ci nida tu luma' taydaan i buyu mueneng. tuluay ku mihcaan mapasakamu nu di'tu a kamuan ci nida, sumaden ku yadahay nu kiwkayan, patideng satu Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay "cacaya ku kakilulen sa", nika mapaedis nu daduducan a mapalaway, katukuh tu sepatay a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan, ci A-ci-mei-ni-de-ti-kuo a cay-sen siacawa tu tataynaan a wawanida, patayda han i Wi-se-ta-pa kuowan, nina kuowan mala kapahay nida a cabayan atu midiputay a tademaw, nina Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay itini i Puo-se amelik satu ka tinengan nu tademaw. . kapatayanś≠Ľšļ° nikaudip ni Suo-luo-ya-se-de pitu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mihcaan ku nikaudip, itini i Tu-lan atu Puo-se-ti-kuo nikalepacawan, itida ci nida i miyu Patayan nutaw a mapatay. . lalidŚĹĪťüŅ De-kuo cesyecia ci Cay-ni nisulitan tu " Ca-la-tu-se-te'-la hinisa, pangangan sasahican ku Si-la nipangangan tu Suo-luo-ya-se-de a tadangangan, idaw ku ilabuay nu imian. .
S.PHON: == suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô***** == suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô "si-r~…ĺa-ji : "********** kaudipan nida kar~…ĺawr~…ĺawan nu katuudaj, idaw ku musakamuaj nuajawan tu n…ômtu war~…ĺ mińßa ¶aan tu nuajawan a ¶a tu r~…ĺimr~…ĺim ¶aj mińß ¶aan" i ¶udada sa ¶…ôa-r~…ĺa-tu-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa "a-wi-s…ô-tuo-ji : zara*u*tra, jimi "idawaj ku r~…ĺuo-tuo a tad…ômaw", ¶i ku-puo-s…ô mar~…ĺuajawaj matin…ôŇčaj mutad…ômaw, mipajpajan tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ a patid…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômawan. suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô mińßapusa a-ńßu-r~…ĺa.ma- ¶…ô u patid…ôŇčaj tu di Ē~ °tuan sa, sisa ¶i nida sadikudaj mar~…ĺa suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj a satar~…ĺakawaj nu di Ē~ °tuan. nina kiwkaj minajat tu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu mińß ¶aan. katukuńß ajda idaw ńß…ônaj ku misinzaaj nu tad…ôamwan. ¶i nida u suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô sakajkiwkaj nu ¶udad "a-wi-s…ô-ta" u "puo-s…ô-ku- ¶in" nu " ¶…ôi-taj" a misur~…ĺitaj nu tad…ômaw. idaw ku kamu tu nikatabar~…ĺ a pataj. nina naajawaj a kiwkaj sakamusa "a-ńßu-r~…ĺa- ¶iw", "ma- ¶…ô-ta- ¶ia", tada misinza tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu a-ńßu-r~…ĺa.ma- ¶…ô-ta-ku Ē~ °. :zara*u*tra,**" . nikaudip** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida i mi-ti-wan-kuo " ajdaaj nu ji-r~…ĺan amisan" a siidaaj nu misubajuaj a r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan ku wina, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči ku wama. tusa ku mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijasa ¶i nida tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tajdaan i buju mu…ôn…ôŇč. tur~…ĺuaj ku mińß ¶aan mapasakamu nu di Ē~ °tu a kamuan ¶i nida, sumad…ôn ku jadańßaj nu kiwkajan, patid…ôŇč satu suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj " ¶a ¶aja ku kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn sa", nika mapa…ôdis nu dadudu ¶an a mapar~…ĺawaj, katukuńß tu s…ôpataj a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶aan, ¶i a- ¶i-m…ôi-ni-d…ô-ti-kuo a ¶aj-s…ôn sia ¶awa tu tatajnaan a wawanida, patajda ńßan i wi-s…ô-ta-pa kuowan, nina kuowan mar~…ĺa kapańßaj nida a ¶abajan atu midiputaj a tad…ômaw, nina suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj itini i puo-s…ô am…ôr~…ĺik satu ka tin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw. . kapatajan** nikaudip ni suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô pitu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mińß ¶aan ku nikaudip, itini i tu-r~…ĺan atu puo-s…ô-ti-kuo nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, itida ¶i nida i miju patajan nutaw a mapataj. . r~…ĺar~…ĺid** d…ô-kuo ¶…ôsj…ô ¶ia ¶i ¶aj-ni nisur~…ĺitan tu " ¶a-r~…ĺa-tu-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa ńßinisa, paŇčaŇčan sasańßi ¶an ku si-r~…ĺa nipaŇčaŇčan tu suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô a tadaŇčaŇčan, idaw ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu imian. .
S.FORM: == Suo-luo-ya-se-deÁĎ£ÁĺÖšļěśĖĮŚĺ∑ == Suo-luo-ya-se-de "Si-la-yi : "őĖŌČŌĀőŅő¨ŌÉŌĄŌĀő∑Ōā kaudipan nida kalawlawan nu katuuday, idaw ku musakamuay nuayawan tu nemtu wal mihacaan tu nuayawan aca tu limlim cay mihcaan" i cudada sa Cea-la-tu-se-te'-la "A-wi-se-tuo-yi : ZaraőłuŇ°tra, yimi "idaway ku Luo-tuo a tademaw", ci Ku-puo-se maluayaway matinengay mutademaw, mipaypayan tu lamal a patidengay nu tademawan. Suo-luo-ya-se-de mihapusa A-hu-la.Ma-ce u patidengay tu di'tuan sa, sisa ci nida sadikuday mala Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay a satalakaway nu di'tuan. nina kiwkay minayat tu tusa malebut lima a lasubu mihcaan. katukuh ayda idaw henay ku misinzaay nu tadeamwan. ci nida u Suo-luo-ya-se-de sakaykiwkay nu cudad "A-wi-se-ta" u "Puo-se-ku-cin" nu "Cei-tay" a misulitay nu tademaw. idaw ku kamu tu nikatabal a patay. nina naayaway a kiwkay sakamusa "A-hu-la-ciw", "Ma-ce-ta-cia", tada misinza tu satalakaway nu A-hu-la.Ma-ce-ta-ku'. :ZaraőłuŇ°tra,śĄŹÁāļ" . nikaudipÁĒüŚĻ≥ pilecuhan nida i Mi-ti-wan-kuo " aydaay nu Yi-lan amisan" a siidaay nu misubayuay a lumaan, limucedan ku wina, caay ka tinengi ku wama. tusa ku mihcaan miliyasa ci nida tu luma' taydaan i buyu mueneng. tuluay ku mihcaan mapasakamu nu di'tu a kamuan ci nida, sumaden ku yadahay nu kiwkayan, patideng satu Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay "cacaya ku kakilulen sa", nika mapaedis nu daduducan a mapalaway, katukuh tu sepatay a bataan idaw ku tusa a mihcaan, ci A-ci-mei-ni-de-ti-kuo a cay-sen siacawa tu tataynaan a wawanida, patayda han i Wi-se-ta-pa kuowan, nina kuowan mala kapahay nida a cabayan atu midiputay a tademaw, nina Suo-luo-ya-se-de kiwkay itini i Puo-se amelik satu ka tinengan nu tademaw. . kapatayanś≠Ľšļ° nikaudip ni Suo-luo-ya-se-de pitu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mihcaan ku nikaudip, itini i Tu-lan atu Puo-se-ti-kuo nikalepacawan, itida ci nida i miyu Patayan nutaw a mapatay. . lalidŚĹĪťüŅ De-kuo cesyecia ci Cay-ni nisulitan tu " Ca-la-tu-se-te'-la hinisa, pangangan sasahican ku Si-la nipangangan tu Suo-luo-ya-se-de a tadangangan, idaw ku ilabuay nu imian. .

nuajawan a ¶a tu r~…ĺimr~…ĺim ¶aj mińß ¶aan" i ¶udada sa ¶…ôa-r~…ĺa-tu-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa "a-wi-s…ô-tuo-ji : zara*u*tra, jimi "idawaj ku r~…ĺuo-tuo a tad…ômaw", ¶i ku-puo-s…ô mar~…ĺuajawaj matin…ôŇčaj mutad…ômaw, mipajpajan tu r~…ĺamar~…ĺ a patid…ôŇčaj nu tad…ômawan. suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô mińßapusa a-ńßu-r~…ĺa.ma- ¶…ô u patid…ôŇčaj tu di Ē~ °tuan sa, sisa ¶i nida sadikudaj mar~…ĺa suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj a satar~…ĺakawaj nu di Ē~ °tuan. nina kiwkaj minajat tu tusa mar~…ĺ…ôbut r~…ĺima a r~…ĺasubu mińß ¶aan. katukuńß ajda idaw ńß…ônaj ku misinzaaj nu tad…ôamwan. ¶i nida u suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô sakajkiwkaj nu ¶udad "a-wi-s…ô-ta" u "puo-s…ô-ku- ¶in" nu " ¶…ôi-taj" a misur~…ĺitaj nu tad…ômaw. idaw ku kamu tu nikatabar~…ĺ a pataj. nina naajawaj a kiwkaj sakamusa "a-ńßu-r~…ĺa- ¶iw", "ma- ¶…ô-ta- ¶ia", tada misinza tu satar~…ĺakawaj nu a-ńßu-r~…ĺa.ma- ¶…ô-ta-ku Ē~ °. :zara*u*tra,**" . nikaudip** pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan nida i mi-ti-wan-kuo " ajdaaj nu ji-r~…ĺan amisan" a siidaaj nu misubajuaj a r~…ĺumaan, r~…ĺimu ¶…ôdan ku wina, ¶aaj ka tin…ôŇči ku wama. tusa ku mińß ¶aan mir~…ĺijasa ¶i nida tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° tajdaan i buju mu…ôn…ôŇč. tur~…ĺuaj ku mińß ¶aan mapasakamu nu di Ē~ °tu a kamuan ¶i nida, sumad…ôn ku jadańßaj nu kiwkajan, patid…ôŇč satu suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj " ¶a ¶aja ku kakir~…ĺur~…ĺ…ôn sa", nika mapa…ôdis nu dadudu ¶an a mapar~…ĺawaj, katukuńß tu s…ôpataj a bataan idaw ku tusa a mińß ¶aan, ¶i a- ¶i-m…ôi-ni-d…ô-ti-kuo a ¶aj-s…ôn sia ¶awa tu tatajnaan a wawanida, patajda ńßan i wi-s…ô-ta-pa kuowan, nina kuowan mar~…ĺa kapańßaj nida a ¶abajan atu midiputaj a tad…ômaw, nina suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô kiwkaj itini i puo-s…ô am…ôr~…ĺik satu ka tin…ôŇčan nu tad…ômaw. . kapatajan** nikaudip ni suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô pitu a bataan idaw ku pitu nu mińß ¶aan ku nikaudip, itini i tu-r~…ĺan atu puo-s…ô-ti-kuo nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, itida ¶i nida i miju patajan nutaw a mapataj. . r~…ĺar~…ĺid** d…ô-kuo ¶…ôsj…ô ¶ia ¶i ¶aj-ni nisur~…ĺitan tu " ¶a-r~…ĺa-tu-s…ô-t…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺa ńßinisa, paŇčaŇčan sasańßi ¶an ku si-r~…ĺa nipaŇčaŇčan tu suo-r~…ĺuo-ja-s…ô-d…ô a tadaŇčaŇčan, idaw ku ir~…ĺabuaj nu imian. .
